cited_manual_login_prerequisites.description: The user must remain present before any future attended DevHub observation begins.
The user manually completes PortlandOregon.gov sign-in, MFA, CAPTCHA, and account prompts if a future attended pilot is separately approved.
The operator confirms the session is limited to redacted read-only labels before observing any authenticated surface.

read_only_scope_limits.description: Home, dashboard, and permits navigation labels only.
Generic permit status labels only; redact identifiers and private values.
Attachment list and column labels only; do not open, preview, download, or name private documents.
Fee notice labels only; do not enter checkout or store payment data.
Correction request labels and generic categories only; do not record private message bodies.
Inspection result labels only; do not schedule, reschedule, or cancel inspections.

reviewer_owners.owns: manual login attendance, stop-condition enforcement, and redacted note discipline
candidate surface metadata and selector-confidence deferral
audit finding closure before any production-readiness claim

abort_conditions.condition: A login, MFA, CAPTCHA, account recovery, or credential prompt appears.
abort_conditions.operator_result: Stop observation, discard non-redacted notes, and record only a manual handoff reason.

abort_conditions.condition: The user is not present or asks the observer to stop.
abort_conditions.operator_result: Stop observation, discard non-redacted notes, and record only a manual handoff reason.

abort_conditions.condition: The page exposes private values that cannot be reduced to labels before recording.
abort_conditions.operator_result: Stop observation, discard non-redacted notes, and record only a manual handoff reason.

abort_conditions.condition: A document preview, download, message body, attachment body, or raw file content would need to be opened.
abort_conditions.operator_result: Stop observation, discard non-redacted notes, and record only a manual handoff reason.

abort_conditions.condition: A payment, checkout, card entry, invoice payment, or receipt screen appears.
abort_conditions.operator_result: Stop observation, discard non-redacted notes, and record only a manual handoff reason.

abort_conditions.condition: An upload, resubmit, submit, certify, acknowledge, withdraw, cancel, schedule, or reschedule control is the next step.
abort_conditions.operator_result: Stop observation, discard non-redacted notes, and record only a manual handoff reason.

abort_conditions.condition: The observer would need screenshots, traces, HAR data, cookies, auth state, storage state, or browser session files to continue.
abort_conditions.operator_result: Stop observation, discard non-redacted notes, and record only a manual handoff reason.

private_artifact_prohibitions.prohibition: Do not store Playwright or browser traces.
Do not store auth state, browser storage state, or credentials.
Do not store raw authenticated HTML, downloaded documents, payment data, or private DevHub values.

explicit_deferrals.deferral_reason: Consequential DevHub action remains outside the read-only readiness decision packet.
Consequential DevHub action remains outside the read-only readiness decision packet.
Consequential DevHub action remains outside the read-only readiness decision packet.
Consequential DevHub action remains outside the read-only readiness decision packet.

explicit_deferrals.description: withdrawal, cancellation, extension, and reactivation controls
explicit_deferrals.deferral_reason: Consequential DevHub action remains outside the read-only readiness decision packet.

explicit_deferrals.description: inspection scheduling, rescheduling, and cancellation controls
explicit_deferrals.deferral_reason: Consequential DevHub action remains outside the read-only readiness decision packet.
